productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Brown Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this loafer makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. Upper Full grain leather upper with a patterned overlay on the forefoot and backfoot Padded footbed for all-day comfort Slip-on style for easy on/off Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with TPR on the forefoot and heel Forefoot unit has grooved wave-styled lugs and pyramidic lugs, with a textured heel unit for absolute grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
